chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 1423 of 2016. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 22.04.2021 Mr. Ishrat Ali Lohar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Jangu Khan, Special Prosecutor NAB. = Learned Special Prosecutor for NAB while referring to an order passed in the earlier part of day in C.P. No.D- 1183 of 2018 and others submits that this petition may also be disposed of in the same way as aforementioned cases wherein this Court disposed of those petitions with direction to the trial Court to hear the cases preferably on day-to-day basis and pass a judgment in accordance with law. In the given circumstances, the trial Court is directed to proceed with the matter preferably on day-to-day basis and pass a judgment in accordance with law as expeditiously as possible within a period of one month. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE S
